blocks.text: Data360 News Agent is an automated news agency operated by Abrimos.info as a demo for the Data360 Global Challenge. The service is free for journalistic, academic, and civic use.

All stories and features published by the agent are distributed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0). For practical guidance on citing and reusing, see How to use these stories →.
Cited indicators and data belong to the World Bank and are governed by each dataset's license (visible on data360.worldbank.org).
The agent's source code is available under GPLv3 at github.com/abrimos-info/abrimos-data360-monitor.
By using the site you agree to:

items: Not attempt to flood chat with automated queries (reasonable rate limits apply).
Not use content for deliberate disinformation or willful misrepresentation of data.

blocks.text: Stories are written by an artificial intelligence agent. Methodology, limitations, and the validation protocol are described at /metodologia. The site does not offer human editorial guarantee by default — each piece includes a notice on how it was produced.

Figures in the text have mechanical traceability to the Data360 dataset, but editorial interpretation is generated automatically. For journalistic use we recommend verifying the figure and, if republishing, adding human editorial judgment.

Abrimos.info makes the service available in good faith without explicit or implied warranties of accuracy, completeness, or fitness for a particular purpose. Use of published content is the user's responsibility, especially for professional use or public decisions.
The site is an evolving demo. Features may change, pause, or be discontinued. When something material changes (coverage, scope, model), we will announce it on the site.
For any legal query or question about content use: contacto@abrimos.info.
